case.title: WILLIAMS & CO., INC. v. CITY OF PITTSBURGH

opinion.h1: WILLIAMS & CO., INC. v. CITY OF PITTSBURGH, 393 U.S. 319 (1969)
opinion.h4: WILLIAMS & CO., INC. v. CITY OF PITTSBURGH ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 706. Decided January 13, 1969.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
393 U.S. 319 COX ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE WESTERN DISTRICT OF MISSOURI. No. 708. Decided January 13, 1969.
Solicitor General Griswold, Assistant Attorney General Zimmerman, Howard E. Shapiro, Robert W. Ginnane, and Fritz R. Kahn for the United States et al.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
